title: PodPivom
body:
# 🌟 PodPivom resource pack

## ⚡ Optimized & Lightweight  
- **Custom optimization:** 99% of textures have been converted to an **8-bit system**, reducing the resource pack size **by 4 times** while maintaining high quality!  

## 🎨 Revamped Textures  
- **New item textures** for a fresh and refined look.  
- **New armor textures** with improved details.  
- **New block textures** for a more immersive world.  
- **Custom sky textures** to enhance the atmosphere.  

## 🔊 Audio & Models
- **New sound effects** to enrich gameplay.  
- **Mini Items:** Certain dropped items appear in a **smaller, more compact form**, improving visibility and aesthetics.  
- **Item Physics:** Dropped items now **fall naturally** and interact with the environment instead of floating unrealistically *(1.12 only).*
- **Custom 3D models** for both **items and blocks**, adding depth and realism to the world.  

🔥 Improve your Minecraft experience with **PodPivom resource pack**! 🔥
